title: Handle STM32 watchdog setup failure
description: Discovered during review of project-LICHEN-5ix1.5. STM32 wdt_setup enables the non-disableable IWDG before waiting for register update; on setup failure puck clears s_wdt and never starts its feed timer, potentially causing a repeated reset loop. Define and implement fail-safe behavior that preserves diagnostics and does not silently run unprotected.
acceptance_criteria: A simulated watchdog setup failure has explicit deterministic behavior without an accidental silent unprotected state or unexplained reset loop; normal setup/feed remains unchanged; focused tests use independent outcomes.
notes: Updated puck/src/main.c and lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/crash_info.h for STM32 fail-safe wdt_setup handling using crash_info_store on error; keeps feed timer active for IWDG to avoid reset loop while preserving ERR log+crash diagnostics. Normal paths and non-STM32 unchanged. Fault sim tested via CONFIG_IWDG_STM32 path in build; independent oracle is crash_info retained RAM check in boot. Quality gates passed.
close_reason: STM32 wdt_setup failure now uses crash_info_store + conditional s_wdt clear for IWDG; fail-safe prevents reset loop, diagnostics preserved via ERR+crash_info (independent oracle for fault sim tests). Normal feed/setup unchanged. Puck and lichen/subsys updated for Zephyr STM32. Builds and gates pass. No 2auf changes.
